title: VILLAGE CRAFT
description: A mod pack used in Village Craft SMP
body:
### **VILLAGE CRAFT**

This is a mod pack that add new structures, creatures, farming and more!
This mod pack was made for the **VILLAGE CRAFT SMP**

This mod pack adds new way of playing minecraft! You can Start a farm with hundreds of plants, or adventure and see new structures youve never seen before, or maybe become a photographer who takes pictures of the world around them! And so much more to do in **Village Craft**! 

_Recomended to play with friends but is still just as fun by your self!_

**created by : Squallzzz**
